confirm-create-platforms: RomM will create Structure {structure} ({pattern}) with {count} platform{plural}. Continue?
confirm-no-platforms: No folder structure detected and no platforms selected. You will need to create the folder structure manually. Continue?
confirm-no-structure: No folder structure detected. RomM will create Structure A (roms/{platform}) with {count} platform{plural}. Continue?
no-structure-detected: No structure detected - Structure A will be created
supported-platforms-lead: Choose which platforms RomM should manage. Detected platforms are locked in; pick more to create their folders.
no-structure-banner-body: RomM will create Structure A and add the selected platforms inside.
unidentified-platforms-hint: Folders RomM couldn't match to a known platform. They stay where they are.
footer-create-summary-none: No new folders will be created
step-coming-soon: This step will be migrated soon.
admin-user-intro: This account owns the library and manages other users. You can add more accounts later from settings.
admin-can-manage-library: Manage the library: add platforms, scan ROMs, edit metadata.
admin-can-manage-users: Create and manage other user accounts and their permissions.
admin-can-configure: Configure metadata sources, integrations, and server settings.
admin-credentials-warning: Save these credentials. You'll need them to sign in next.
metadata-sources-intro: RomM uses these services to fetch game info, covers, and other metadata. Anything without a key right now can be configured later from settings.
metadata-catalogs-hint: First-party catalogues. RomM queries them directly with your API key.
metadata-specialised-hint: Domain-specific data: achievements, cover art, completion times.
metadata-proxies-hint: Community-hosted matchers that improve hits using file hashes.
provider-igdb-desc: Titles, descriptions, cover art, screenshots, and related-game data.
provider-moby-desc: Catalogue, alternate cover art, and screenshots. The API is a paid feature.
provider-ss-desc: Cover art across regions, manuals, 3D boxes, and CD/cartridge art.
provider-ra-desc: Achievement progress and unlock data per user. Requires file hashes.
provider-launchbox-desc: Community metadata, cover art, and screenshots. Matches by exact filename.
provider-flashpoint-desc: Metadata for 180,000+ Flash and browser-based games.
provider-sgdb-desc: Alternative cover art, banners, logos, and heroes for any game.
proxy-hasheous-desc: Hash-based matcher that proxies IGDB data and supplies RetroAchievements IDs.
proxy-playmatch-desc: Hash-based matcher paired with IGDB. Community-hosted service.
